headline: Trump 🍊👑 tells Team 'DON'T RUSH 🚫💨' Iran Deal 🕊️
text: Trump 🍊🕶️ straight-up YEETED 🏈📱 his negotiators: 'DON'T RUSH 🚫⏳ into this Iran deal OR ELSE 😤💥!' Talks are 'CONSTRUCTIVE' 🛠️🤝 but 'both sides gotta take their TIME ⏰⏳ and GET IT RIGHT ✅🧠' says the Don on Truth Social 📲🔥! The big MOOT deal 📜🧾 is a 60-day CEASEFIRE EXTENSION 🛑🤝 that REOPENS the Strait of Hormuz 🌊🚢 so 20% of world OIL 🛢️🔥 & LNG can flow again without TOLLS 💸🚫! Iran’s uranium stash 🧪☢️ (440kg of 60% juice 🥤) stays on the table for later talks, no final nuke 🚫💣 settlement yet! Ted Cruz 🤠😡 calls it a 'DISASTROUS MISTAKE' 💣🔥 while Wicker 🪑⚔️ says 60 days wipes out all gains from Operation Epic Fury 🗡️💥! Lawler 🏛️👏 says Trump FORCED the regime to the table like a BOSS 💼🍆! US + Israel 🇺🇸🇮🇱 launched strikes Feb 28 💣✈️, Iran clapped back 🚀🌍 and shut the Hormuz valve 💧🚫 sending oil prices MOONING 📈🌕! Blockade stays LOCKED 🔒⚓ till the ink dries! Rubio 🧔🗣️ says 'significant progress' but 'not final' 📈🤏, hinting at a TOTALLY OPEN strait 🛣️🌊! Pezeshkian 🇮🇷📺 swears Iran wants PEACE ☮️ not bombs 💣, while Pakistan’s Dar 🇵🇰🤝 calls it 'GROUNDS FOR OPTIMISM' 🌱😌! Iran and US both say it's a MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING 📝🤝 not the FINAL BOSS LEVEL 👾🔥! Trump warns Tehran loud and clear: 'NO NUKES 🛑☢️ OR WE'RE BACK BABY!' 🔙💥! Wall Street and oil traders are SWEATING 😰💦 while memes go BRRRR 🤖📈!
